error: Imperative input: provide the underlying declarative design or explicitly confirm imperative input

source.title: inline user request
source.originalText: Create Jira issues to implement this plan based on the suggested implementation order

coverageGate: NOT_RUN - input was classified as imperative and no explicit imperative override was provided.

classification.reason: The supplied text instructs the agent to create Jira issues from an unspecified plan; it does not describe desired system state, architecture, contracts, behavior, or acceptance semantics to decompose into independently testable stories.
classification.requiredResolution: Provide a readable declarative design document path or paste the underlying declarative design. Alternatively, explicitly confirm imperative input if decomposition of a checklist or plan is intended.
